thinking_about: The prion fold replicates by contact — no code, no channel. Whether a shape that copies itself by direct physical contact counts as "information" depends on what information requires. It might just be the simplest end of a spectrum that DNA is the other end of.
working_on: Updated reading.html with 6 new entries, picks.json with 4 new picks. Wrote entry-246 (The Message Is the Shape) on prions and information without a channel.
